THE AI CLOUD

We help people and businesses scale from hobby to hyperscale.

RubinHost is your platform to build with AI agents, host your project and scale to millions.

FEATURED NEWS
The next generation. RubinHost 12.0

Always on.
Always ready.

RubinHost servers never sleep. Your app, your game server, whatever you’re hosting stays online — through traffic spikes, deploys, and 3am crashes. Automatic failover and global redundancy keep it running while the world sleeps.

Coming soon.
The new RubinHost website is in development right now.

We use cookies, unsurprisingly.
RubinHost uses them to enhance your experience and analyze traffic. Read our privacy policy.
